creator: d@unwiredcouch.com
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #9)

What does that mean? Where are they missing? Is there a command I can run to check? The files I changed in the patch are all changes that git showed. My tree was otherwise clean (aside from all the build output in `./work`). I can take another look to see if I missed anything. But the port built and installed even after `make clean` for me so I assumed I had included everything.
